content_en:
Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations 59

Abu Hurairah 4 related that the Messenger of Allah #% said, “The Hour will not come until the Furaat lays bare a mountain of gold; people will fight over it, and from every 100 (people), 99 will be killed. Every man among them will say, ’ perhaps I will be the one who will be saved.” (Muslim)

In another narration, ‘Abdullah ibn Al-Haarith said, “I was standing with Ubai ibn Ka‘ab in the shade of Hassaan’s high house, and he said, ‘People will continue with their differing necks to seek out the world.’ | said, ‘Yes.’ He said, ‘Indeed I heard the Messenger of Allah #8 say, ‘The time draws near when the Furaat will lay bare a mountain of gold. When people wiil hear about it they will proceed to it, and the one beside it will say, ‘ If we leave the people to take from it, all of it will depart.’ And so they will fight over it, with 99 (people) dying from every 100.’ (Muslim)

The Many Dajjals That Appear Before The Hour, And The Hour Will Arrive At A Time When People Will Be Heedless Of It

Abu Hurairah # related that the Messenger of Allah #¢ said, “The Hour will not come to pass until two huge groups, each having the same claim, fight, and between them there will be a great amount of killing; until lying Dajjaals are sent, almost 30 of them, and each one of them will claim that he is the Messenger of Allah; until knowledge is taken, earthquakes increase in frequency, time converges! , trials appear (or become widespread), and killing increases in frequency; until there will be much wealth among you, to the degree that the owner of wealth will be distressed to find one who accepts his charity or one to whom he can offer his wealth, and the one to whom he offers his wealth says, ‘ I have no need’; until

"I Some scholars understand the literal meaning of this phrase; others say that it is referring to the nearness of the Hour; and yet others hold that it is referring to the apparent quick passage of day and night, whereby people will not be blessed in their time.

60 Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations

people vie with one another in constructing tall buildings; until a man passes by the grave of another man and says, ’ Would that I were in his place’; until the sun rises from the West, and when it does rise (from the West) and people see it, they will all believe, except that that is when ’no good will it do to a person to believe then, if he believed not before, nor earned good (by performing deeds of righteousness) through his faith.’ And just as the Hour arrives, two men spread a garment between them, yet they will neither trade nor fold it. And the Hour will indeed arrive as a man leaves with the milk of his camel, yet he will not taste it. And the Hour will indeed arrive as one is plastering his basin, but he will not drink from it. And the hour will indeed arrive as one raises his food to his mouth, but he will not eat it.” (Bukhaaree)

Abu Hurairah 2 related that the Messenger of Allah 2% said, “Iraq will be prevented from its dirham (a currency) and its measurement; Sham will be prevented from its dinar (a currency) and its measurement; and Egypt will be prevented from its dinar and its measurement"! . You will have returned from whence you began; you will return from whence you began; you will return from whence you began.” Abu Hurairah 4% said, “The flesh and blood of Abu Hurairah bore witness to that.” (Muslim)

Abu Nusrah said, “We were with Jaabir #, and he said, ‘It is almost time when neither dinar nor Madyee (the measurement in Iraq) will come to the people of the Iraq.’ We said, ‘From where will that happen” He said, ‘From Rome, who will prevent that (from them).’

Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations 61

He was quiet for a short while and then said, ‘The Messenger of Allah #% said: In the last of my nation there will be a Khaleefa who will throw handfuls of money (for charity) without counting or keeping account.” (Ahmad) Al-Hurairee said, “When I was speaking to Abu Nusrah and Abu Al-‘Alaa, I said that it was perhaps referring to ‘Umar ibn ‘Abdul-‘Azeez. And they both said, No.”

Two Categories Of People That Will Inhabit The Hellfire, And We Seek Refuge In Allah, The Lord Of All That Exists

Excuses For Not Ordering Others To Good. And Forbidding Them From Evil

Anas ibn Maalik 2 reported that the Prophet 2% was asked, “O Messenger of Allah, when do we abstain from ordering the good and forbidding the evil?” He #% said, “When the likes of what appeared among the children of Israel appears among you — when wicked deeds will be among your elders, when knowledge will be with the lowest from you, and when authority is given to your young ones.” (Ahmad) Ibn Maajah related the same from Anas 4, but with another chain.

62 Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations

People Will Leave The Religion In Throngs

The neighbor of Jaabir ibn ‘Abdullah # said, “When I returned from a journey, Jaabir came to give me greetings of peace. I began to tell him about division among the people and some of the new (and blameworthy) matters that they were doing. Jaabir began to cry, and then he said, ‘I heard the Messenger of Allah 2 say: Indeed people entered into Allah’s religion in throngs and they will leave it in

Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations 63

News From The Messenger #@ Of Destructive Trials That Will Make The One Who Adheres To His Religion Like One Who Is Grasping Embers

News From The Prophet #@ Of The Nations Gathering Against The Muslims, Seeking To Weaken Them, Even Though The Muslims Will Be Large In Numbers

Abu Hurairah -# said that he heard the Messenger of Allah 2% say to Thaubaan #, “How will you be when the nations will call each other upon you as those who are dining call each other to their dish?” Thaubaan asked, “...O Messenger of Allah, will that be because we will be few (in number)?” He # said, “No, rather at that time you will be many, yet Al-Wahn will be cast into your hearts.” “And what is Al-Walin, O Messenger of Allah?” The Prophet 2 said, “Your love for the world and your hate for fighting.” (Ahmad)

The Messenger # Intimated That A Destructive Fitnah Will Occur And Safety From It Achieved By Staying Far Away From It And From Ways That Lead To It

‘Amr ibn Waabisah Al-Asdee related that his father said, “As I was within my home in Kufa, I heard ‘Assalaamu ‘Alaikum’ at the door. And I said, ‘Alaikum As-Salaam. The visitor entered and when he came in, (I saw that) it was ‘Abdullah ibn Mas’ood .. I said, ‘O Abu ‘Abdur-Rahmaan, what time is this to visit?’ The time was high noon. He said, ‘The day is long for me and I remembered one to whom I can speak.’ He began to relate to me from the Messenger of Allah 2%, saying, “There will be a trial wherein the one who is

64 Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations

sleeping during it is better than the one who is lying down; and the one who is lying down during it is better than the one who is seated; the one who is seated during it is better than the one who is standing; the one who is standing during it is better than the one is walking; the one who is walking is better than the one who is riding; the one who is riding is better than the one who is going forth quickly (seeking it out). All of those killed during it are in the Hellfire.” ‘Abdullah ibn Masood #e asked, “O Messenger of Allah, and when is that?” He #g said, “The days of much killing, when a man will not be safe from the companion he sits with.” He 4s said, “And what do you order me to do if I reach that (time)? The Prophet # said, “Restrain yourself and your hand and enter your home.” “O Messenger of Allah, and suppose a man enters upon me in my home?” The Prophet #¢ said, “Then lock your house.” ‘Abdullah Ibn Mas‘ood & asked, “Suppose he enters (forcefully) upon my house?” The Prophet s said, “Then enter your Masjid and do like this,” and he then closed his right (hand) on his wrist, “and say,’ My Lord is Allah’ until you die upon that.” (Ahmad)
content_id:
Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Cobaan Besar 59

Abu Hurairah # meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah #% bersabda, "Hari Kiamat tidak akan datang hingga sungai Furaat menyingkap sebuah gunung emas; orang-orang akan berperang atasnya, dan dari setiap 100 (orang), 99 akan terbunuh. Setiap orang di antara mereka akan berkata, 'Mungkin aku akan menjadi orang yang selamat.'" (Muslim)

Dalam riwayat lain, 'Abdullah ibn Al-Haarith berkata, "Aku sedang berdiri bersama Ubai ibn Ka'ab di bawah naungan rumah tinggi Hassaan, dan ia berkata, 'Orang-orang akan terus dengan leher-leher mereka yang berbeda-beda mencari dunia.' Aku berkata, 'Ya.' Ia berkata, 'Sesungguhnya aku mendengar Rasulullah #8 berkata, 'Waktu telah mendekat ketika sungai Furaat akan menyingkap sebuah gunung emas. Ketika orang-orang mendengar tentangnya mereka akan berduyun-duyun ke sana, dan orang yang ada di sisinya akan berkata, "Jika kita biarkan orang-orang mengambil darinya, semuanya akan habis." Dan sehingga mereka akan berperang atasnya, dengan 99 (orang) mati dari setiap 100.'" (Muslim)

Banyaknya Dajjal-Dajjal yang Muncul Sebelum Hari Kiamat, dan Hari Kiamat Akan Tiba pada Saat Orang-Orang Lalai Darinya

Abu Hurairah # meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah #¢ bersabda, "Hari Kiamat tidak akan terjadi sampai dua kelompok besar, yang masing-masing mengklaim hal yang sama, berperang, dan di antara keduanya akan ada banyak pembunuhan; sampai dajjal-dajjal pendusta diutus, hampir 30 orang, dan masing-masing akan mengklaim bahwa dirinya adalah Rasulullah; sampai ilmu diambil, gempa bumi semakin sering terjadi, waktu semakin konvergen, fitnah-fitnah muncul (atau menjadi meluas), dan pembunuhan semakin sering; sampai akan ada banyak kekayaan di antara kalian, hingga pemilik kekayaan akan resah tidak menemukan seseorang yang menerima sedekahnya atau seseorang yang kepadanya ia dapat menawarkan hartanya, dan orang yang kepadanya ia menawarkan hartanya berkata, 'Aku tidak membutuhkannya'; sampai

"! Beberapa ulama memahami makna harfiah dari ungkapan ini; yang lain mengatakan bahwa itu mengacu pada dekatnya Hari Kiamat; dan yang lain lagi berpendapat bahwa itu mengacu pada berlalunya siang dan malam secara cepat yang tampak, di mana orang-orang tidak akan mendapat berkah dalam waktu mereka.

60 Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Cobaan Besar

orang-orang berlomba-lomba dalam membangun gedung-gedung tinggi; sampai seorang laki-laki melewati kuburan orang lain dan berkata, 'Andai saja aku ada di tempatnya'; sampai matahari terbit dari Barat, dan ketika ia terbit (dari Barat) dan orang-orang melihatnya, mereka semua akan beriman, kecuali bahwa itulah saat 'tidak ada gunanya bagi seseorang untuk beriman pada saat itu, jika ia tidak beriman sebelumnya, dan tidak pula beramal kebaikan melalui imannya.' Dan tepat ketika Hari Kiamat tiba, dua orang membentangkan sehelai kain di antara mereka, namun mereka tidak akan sempat berdagang atau melipatnya. Dan Hari Kiamat sungguh akan tiba saat seseorang pergi dengan susu untanya, namun ia tidak akan sempat meminumnya. Dan Hari Kiamat sungguh akan tiba saat seseorang sedang memplester wadahnya, namun ia tidak akan sempat minum darinya. Dan Hari Kiamat sungguh akan tiba saat seseorang mengangkat makanannya ke mulutnya, namun ia tidak akan sempat memakannya." (Bukhaaree)

Abu Hurairah # meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah #% bersabda, "Iraq akan dihalangi dari dirham (mata uangnya) dan ukurannya; Syam akan dihalangi dari dinar (mata uangnya) dan ukurannya; dan Mesir akan dihalangi dari dinar dan ukurannya. Kalian akan kembali dari mana kalian memulai; kalian akan kembali dari mana kalian memulai; kalian akan kembali dari mana kalian memulai." Abu Hurairah # berkata, "Daging dan darah Abu Hurairah menjadi saksi atas hal itu." (Muslim)

Abu Nusrah berkata, "Kami bersama Jaabir #, dan ia berkata, 'Hampir tiba saatnya ketika tidak ada dinar maupun Madyee (ukuran di Iraq) yang akan sampai kepada penduduk Iraq.' Kami berkata, 'Dari mana itu akan terjadi?' Ia berkata, 'Dari Roma, yang akan menghalangi itu (dari mereka).'

Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Cobaan Besar 61

Ia diam sejenak kemudian berkata, 'Rasulullah #% berkata: Di akhir umatku akan ada seorang Khalifah yang akan melemparkan genggaman-genggaman uang (untuk sedekah) tanpa menghitung atau mencatat.' " Al-Hurairee berkata, "Ketika aku sedang berbicara dengan Abu Nusrah dan Abu Al-'Alaa, aku berkata bahwa itu mungkin mengacu kepada 'Umar ibn 'Abdul-'Azeez. Dan keduanya berkata, 'Tidak.'"

Dua Golongan Manusia yang Akan Menghuni Neraka, dan Kami Berlindung kepada Allah, Tuhan Seluruh Alam

Alasan untuk Tidak Menyuruh kepada Kebaikan. Dan Melarang dari Keburukan

Anas ibn Maalik # melaporkan bahwa Nabi #% ditanya, "Wahai Rasulullah, kapan kita menahan diri dari menyuruh kepada kebaikan dan melarang dari keburukan?" Beliau #% berkata, "Ketika yang seperti apa yang muncul di kalangan Bani Israel muncul di antara kalian — ketika perbuatan-perbuatan jahat ada pada orang-orang tua kalian, ketika ilmu ada pada orang-orang yang paling rendah di antara kalian, dan ketika kekuasaan diberikan kepada orang-orang muda kalian." (Ahmad) Ibn Maajah meriwayatkan hal yang sama dari Anas #, tetapi dengan sanad lain.

62 Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Cobaan Besar

Orang-Orang Akan Meninggalkan Agama Secara Berbondong-Bondong

Tetangga Jaabir ibn 'Abdullah # berkata, "Ketika aku kembali dari perjalanan, Jaabir datang untuk memberiku salam. Aku mulai menceritakan kepadanya tentang perpecahan di antara orang-orang dan beberapa perkara baru (dan tercela) yang mereka lakukan. Jaabir mulai menangis, kemudian berkata, 'Aku mendengar Rasulullah #% berkata: Sesungguhnya orang-orang masuk ke dalam agama Allah secara berbondong-bondong dan mereka akan meninggalkannya secara

Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Cobaan Besar 63

Berita dari Rasulullah #@ tentang Fitnah-Fitnah yang Merusak yang Akan Membuat Orang yang Berpegang Teguh pada Agamanya Seperti Orang yang Menggenggam Bara Api

Berita dari Nabi #@ tentang Umat-Umat yang Berhimpun Melawan Kaum Muslimin, Berusaha Melemahkan Mereka, Meskipun Kaum Muslimin akan Berjumlah Banyak

Abu Hurairah # berkata bahwa ia mendengar Rasulullah #% berkata kepada Thaubaan #, "Bagaimana keadaan kalian ketika umat-umat akan saling berseru satu sama lain untuk mengeroyok kalian seperti orang-orang yang sedang makan saling berseru kepada teman-teman mereka untuk menghampiri hidangan mereka?" Thaubaan bertanya, "...Wahai Rasulullah, apakah itu karena kita akan sedikit (jumlahnya)?" Beliau # berkata, "Tidak, melainkan pada saat itu kalian berjumlah banyak, namun Al-Wahn akan dilemparkan ke dalam hati kalian." "Dan apakah Al-Wahn itu, wahai Rasulullah?" Nabi #% berkata, "Cinta kalian kepada dunia dan kebencian kalian terhadap berperang." (Ahmad)

Rasulullah # Memberitahukan Bahwa Sebuah Fitnah yang Merusak Akan Terjadi dan Keselamatan Darinya Dicapai dengan Menjauhinya dan Jalan-Jalan yang Menuju Kepadanya

'Amr ibn Waabisah Al-Asdee meriwayatkan bahwa ayahnya berkata, "Ketika aku sedang berada di rumahku di Kufa, aku mendengar 'Assalaamu 'Alaikum' di pintu. Dan aku berkata, 'Wa'alaikum Assalaam.' Tamu itu masuk dan ketika ia masuk, (aku melihat bahwa) ia adalah 'Abdullah ibn Mas'ood #. Aku berkata, 'Wahai Abu 'Abdur-Rahmaan, waktu apa ini untuk berkunjung?' Saat itu tengah hari. Ia berkata, 'Hari terasa panjang bagiku dan aku teringat seseorang yang bisa kuajak bicara.' Ia mulai meriwayatkan kepadaku dari Rasulullah #%, berkata, 'Akan ada sebuah fitnah di mana orang yang

64 Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Cobaan Besar

tidur selama fitnah itu lebih baik daripada yang berbaring; dan yang berbaring selama fitnah itu lebih baik daripada yang duduk; yang duduk lebih baik daripada yang berdiri; yang berdiri lebih baik daripada yang berjalan; yang berjalan lebih baik daripada yang berkendara; yang berkendara lebih baik daripada yang bergerak maju dengan cepat (mencarinya). Semua orang yang terbunuh selama fitnah itu ada di neraka.' 'Abdullah ibn Mas'ood # bertanya, "Wahai Rasulullah, dan kapan itu?" Beliau #g berkata, "Hari-hari pembunuhan yang banyak, ketika seorang laki-laki tidak akan aman dari teman duduknya." Ia # berkata, "Dan apa yang engkau perintahkan kepadaku jika aku sampai pada (masa) itu?" Nabi # berkata, "Tahanlah dirimu dan tanganmu dan masuklah ke rumahmu." "Wahai Rasulullah, dan misalkan seorang laki-laki masuk ke rumahku?" Nabi #¢ berkata, "Maka kunci rumahmu." 'Abdullah Ibn Mas'ood # bertanya, "Misalkan ia masuk (dengan paksa) ke rumahku?" Nabi # berkata, "Maka masuklah ke masjidmu dan lakukan seperti ini," kemudian beliau menutup tangan kanan (nya) di pergelangan tangannya, "dan katakan, 'Tuhanku adalah Allah' hingga kamu mati di atas itu." (Ahmad)
content_ar: الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations 59 أبو هريرة 4 related that الرسول ﷺ of الله #% said, “The Hour will not come حتى the Furaat lays bare a mountain of gold; people will fight over it, and from every 100 (people), 99 will be killed. Every man among them will say, ’ perhaps I will be the one who will be saved.” (مسلم) In another narration, ‘Abdullah ibn Al-Haarith said, “I was standing with Ubai ibn Ka‘ab in the shade of Hassaan’s high house, and قال, ‘People will continue with their differing necks to seek out the الدنيا.’ | said, ‘Yes.’ قال, ‘Indeed I heard الرسول ﷺ of الله #8 say, ‘The time draws near عندما the Furaat will lay bare a mountain of gold. عندما people wiil hear about it they will proceed to it, and the one beside it will say, ‘ إذا we leave the people to take from it, all of it will depart.’ And لذا they will fight over it, with 99 (people) dying from every 100.’ (مسلم) The Many Dajjals That Appear قبل The Hour, And The Hour Will Arrive At A Time عندما People Will Be Heedless Of It أبو هريرة # related that الرسول ﷺ of الله #¢ said, “The Hour will not come to pass حتى two huge groups, each having the same claim, fight, and between them there will be a great amount of killing; حتى lying Dajjaals are sent, almost 30 of them, and each one of them will claim that he is الرسول ﷺ of الله; حتى العلم is taken, earthquakes increase in frequency, time converges! , الابتلاءات appear (or become widespread), and killing increases in frequency; حتى there will be much الثروة among you, to the degree that the owner of الثروة will be distressed to find one who accepts his الصدقة or one to whom he can offer his الثروة, and the one to whom he offers his الثروة says, ‘ I have no need’; حتى "I Some العلماء understand the literal meaning of this phrase; others say that it is referring to the nearness of the Hour; and yet others hold that it is referring to the apparent quick passage of day and night, whereby people will not be blessed in their time. 60 الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations people vie with بعضهم بعضاً in constructing tall buildings; حتى a man passes by the القبر of another man and says, ’ Would that I were in his place’; حتى the sun rises from the West, and عندما it does rise (from the West) and people see it, they will all believe, except that that is عندما ’no الخير will it do to a person to believe then, إذا he believed not قبل, nor earned الخير (by performing deeds of righteousness) through his الإيمان.’ And just as the Hour arrives, two men spread a garment between them, yet they will neither trade nor fold it. And the Hour will indeed arrive as a man leaves with the milk of his camel, yet he will not taste it. And the Hour will indeed arrive as one is plastering his basin, but he will not drink from it. And the hour will indeed arrive as one raises his food to his mouth, but he will not eat it.” (Bukhaaree) أبو هريرة 2 related that الرسول ﷺ of الله 2% said, “Iraq will be prevented from its dirham (a currency) and its measurement; Sham will be prevented from its dinar (a currency) and its measurement; and Egypt will be prevented from its dinar and its measurement"! . You will have returned from whence you began; you will return from whence you began; you will return from whence you began.” أبو هريرة 4% said, “The flesh and blood of أبو هريرة bore witness to that.” (مسلم) Abu Nusrah said, “We were with Jaabir #, and قال, ‘It is almost time عندما neither dinar nor Madyee (the measurement in Iraq) will come to the people of the Iraq.’ We said, ‘From where will that happen” قال, ‘From Rome, who will prevent that (from them).’ الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations 61 He was quiet for a short بينما and then said, ‘الرسول ﷺ of الله #% said: In the last of my nation there will be a Khaleefa who will throw handfuls of المال (for الصدقة) without counting or keeping account.” (أحمد) Al-Hurairee said, “عندما I was speaking to Abu Nusrah and Abu Al-‘Alaa, I said that it was perhaps referring to ‘عمر ibn ‘Abdul-‘Azeez. And they both said, No.” Two Categories Of People That Will Inhabit The النار, And We Seek Refuge In الله, The Lord Of All That Exists Excuses For Not Ordering Others To الخير. And Forbidding Them From الشر أنس ibn Maalik 2 reported that النبي ﷺ 2% was asked, “O Messenger of الله, عندما do we abstain from ordering the الخير and forbidding the الشر?” He #% said, “عندما the likes of what appeared among the الأولاد of Israel appears among you — عندما wicked deeds will be among your elders, عندما العلم will be with the lowest from you, and عندما authority is given to your young ones.” (أحمد) Ibn Maajah related the same from أنس 4, but with another chain. 62 الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations People Will Leave The Religion In Throngs The الجار of Jaabir ibn ‘Abdullah # said, “عندما I returned from a journey, Jaabir came to give me greetings of peace. I began to tell him about division among the people and some of the new (and blameworthy) matters that they were doing. Jaabir began to cry, and then قال, ‘I heard الرسول ﷺ of الله 2 say: Indeed people entered into الله’s religion in throngs and they will leave it in الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations 63 News From الرسول ﷺ #@ Of Destructive الابتلاءات That Will Make The One Who Adheres To His Religion Like One Who Is Grasping Embers News From النبي ﷺ #@ Of The Nations Gathering Against The المسلمون, Seeking To Weaken Them, حتى وإن The المسلمون Will Be Large In Numbers أبو هريرة -# said that he heard الرسول ﷺ of الله 2% say to Thaubaan #, “How will you be عندما the nations will call بعضهم بعضاً upon you as those who are dining call بعضهم بعضاً to their dish?” Thaubaan asked, “...O Messenger of الله, will that be لأن we will be few (in number)?” He # said, “No, rather at that time you will be many, yet Al-Wahn will be cast into your القلوب.” “And what is Al-Walin, O Messenger of الله?” النبي ﷺ 2 said, “Your المحبة for the الدنيا and your الكراهية for fighting.” (أحمد) الرسول ﷺ # Intimated That A Destructive Fitnah Will Occur And Safety From It Achieved By Staying Far Away From It And From Ways That Lead To It ‘Amr ibn Waabisah Al-Asdee related that his الأب said, “As I was within my home in Kufa, I heard ‘Assalaamu ‘Alaikum’ at the door. And I said, ‘Alaikum As-Salaam. The visitor entered and عندما he came in, (I saw that) it was ‘Abdullah ibn Mas’ood .. I said, ‘O Abu ‘Abdur-Rahmaan, what time is this to visit?’ The time was high noon. قال, ‘The day is long for me and I remembered one to whom I can speak.’ He began to relate to me from الرسول ﷺ of الله 2%, saying, “There will be a الابتلاء wherein the one who is 64 الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations sleeping خلال it is better than the one who is lying down; and the one who is lying down خلال it is better than the one who is seated; the one who is seated خلال it is better than the one who is standing; the one who is standing خلال it is better than the one is walking; the one who is walking is better than the one who is riding; the one who is riding is better than the one who is going forth quickly (seeking it out). All of those killed خلال it are in the النار.” ‘Abdullah ibn Masood #e asked, “O Messenger of الله, and عندما is that?” He #g said, “The days of much killing, عندما a man will not be safe from the companion he sits with.” He 4s said, “And what do you order me to do إذا I reach that (time)? النبي ﷺ # said, “Restrain yourself and your hand and enter your home.” “O Messenger of الله, and suppose a man enters upon me in my home?” النبي ﷺ #¢ said, “Then lock your house.” ‘Abdullah Ibn Mas‘ood & asked, “Suppose he enters (forcefully) upon my house?” النبي ﷺ s said, “Then enter your المسجد and do like this,” and he then closed his الحق (hand) on his wrist, “and say,’ My Lord is الله’ حتى you die upon that.” (أحمد)
